programme.desc: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Season 3

programme.title: Donkey Kong Country Double Date Trouble
programme.desc: Donkey Kong tries have lunch with Candy on her day off and watch a movie with Diddy at the same time. He also has to get Bluster to replace some of the booby traps around the Crystal Coconut.

programme.title: SONIC X Fly Spy
programme.desc: The President plants a fake emerald to try and attract Sonic but Rouge takes the bait instead. She winds up being hired by the Government to search inside Eggman's base with another agent, Topaz. Their search was going well, until they encountered the E-70!

programme.title: Coffee Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is out shopping when it starts to rain.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum, at all costs.

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: For Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket is persuaded by a jaunty estate agent to put her house up for sale.

programme.title: Jumping Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to learn skateboarding but hurts himself on his first try.

programme.title: Cat Chaos
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Stick It
programme.desc: Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket's nephew and Bruiser Jnr swopping football stickers.

programme.title: Bean At The Museum
programme.desc: Mr. Bean thinks he's just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden.

programme.title: A Car For Irma
programme.desc: Bean discovers Declan giving Irma a lift in his swanky new SUV.

programme.title: Trophy Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket's Nephew is staying with her when he wins two tickets to an Outward Bound course.

programme.title: Home Movie
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wins two tickets for an exotic cruise and takes Teddy along for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: Coconut Shy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to buy a cup for Teddy, but he has no money.

programme.title: Green Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's electricity is cut off so he decides to build a wind turbine.

programme.title: Cash Machine
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to buy a cupcake, but his wallet is empty, so he has to visit a cash dispenser.

programme.title: Litterbugs
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is furious with the untidy state of the streets so he goes on a one-man mission to clean up the town.

programme.title: Rat Trap
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to deal with an unwanted house guest but the stubborn rat refuses to leave.

programme.title: Valentine's Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to be romantic, but his idea of what that means is different to Irma's.

programme.title: All You Can Eat
programme.desc: Irma is coming for dinner, but Mr. Bean has forgotten about it and so doesn't have anything to cook.

programme.title: Flat Pack
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's bookcase collapses, so he buys a new one in the hardware store.

programme.title: Holiday For Teddy
programme.desc: Mr. Bean takes Teddy on holiday to the seaside.

programme.title: The Newspaper
programme.desc: Every time Bean goes to collect the newspaper from the letterbox, it disappears.

programme.title: Viral Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Scout Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a Scoutmaster for the day.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Max is having trouble convincing Rick that he is truly dedicated to the PPB All Starz. Max just wants to play for love of the game but Rick thinks he should do anything to win. When the competition continues Max demands they fight a "pairs" match so that he and Rick are forced to work as a team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has just returned back from the World Championships with another victory and he's decided to teach a class of boys in the neighborhood the fine art of blading.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
programme.desc: Buddy is taking his show to the beaches and getting into a whole new sport: beach volleyball! Life on the beach isn't as relaxing as it sounds. A rash of mysterious crimes has been plaguing the town and paw prints at the scene seem to point all fingers at Buddy!

programme.title: Dogtanian and the Three Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dogtanian is an ambitious young swordsman who dreams of becoming a hero and joining the legendary Muskehounds. After proving his skills and earning their trust, he and the three Muskehounds must defend the King from the villainous Cardinal Richelieu's secret plot to seize power.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: S1:E1 The Gym | Golf | Ice Climbing | The Swing - Bernard is a hapless anthropomorphic polar bear who always tries to fix the troubles that regularly occur in each episode, but only succeeds in doing even worse damage, often even physically hurting himself. The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: S1:E2 Security Guard | The Vending Machine | Diving Board | Watching TV - Bernard is a hapless anthropomorphic polar bear who always tries to fix the troubles that regularly occur in each episode, but only succeeds in doing even worse damage, often even physically hurting himself. The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Me, Myself and Di
programme.desc: After winning the 'trip of a lifetime' to a caravan park in Rhyl, North Wales, unlucky in love Northerner, Janet Brown, is ready for a holiday romance. Unfortunately, following the advice of best friend Diana (Lucy Pinder) - that Janet should pretend to be the opposite of who she actually is in order to find love - doesn't quite lead to the happily ever after she was hoping for. A laugh-out-loud gritty rom-com with a huge ensemble cast including James Lance (Northern Soul, Bronson, Marie Antoinette, Bel Ami), Will Mellor (Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps, Line of Duty), Larry Lamb (EastEnders, The Hatton Garden Job), Marek Oravec (Captain America: The First Avenger), Wim Snape (The Full Monty, Coronation Street), and Katy Clayton (Casualty, Shameless).

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Fatal Getaway
programme.desc: A group of friends suspect something's not quite right with their handsome host. Starring Christie Burson (2019)

programme.title: Mom Wars
programme.desc: A woman moves with her daughter to the suburbs where her attempts to build a new life see her come into conflict with a clique of bullying mothers. Starring Virginia Tucker (2017)

programme.title: Apocalypse of Ice
programme.desc: A family must try to survive when a massive polar vortex covers most of the planet in ice. Starring Tom Sizemore and Emily Killian (2020)

programme.title: Ape vs Monster
programme.desc: A giant alien Gorilla goes one on one against a mega lizard from Earth. Starring Eric Roberts and Arianna Scott (2021).

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A Manhattan detective is pitted against a young crew that specializes in elaborate heists...

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Barbershop: A Fresh Cut
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Calvin and his longtime crew are still there, but the shop has undergone some major changes. Most noticeably, our once male-dominated sanctuary is now co-ed.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, playfully clashing over everything from ingredients to tastes, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Natalie tries on her grandma's 'magical' wedding veil and is transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children. Is she finally ready to commit?

programme.title: A Romance Wedding
programme.desc: Zoe Davis is a successful and highly driven wedding planner in the big city. When her father asks her for help at the family café shop, she happily drives back to her cozy hometown of Romance, Oregon. Little does she know her mom has already hired Will to help, an aspiring chef and coincidentally...Zoe's childhood sweetheart! Tensions rise between Zoe and Will, but so does the chemistry. Will they settle their differences and find lost love along the way?

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on the worldwide best-selling memoir starring Academy Award® winner Brie Larson and Academy Award® nominees Woody Harrelson and Naomi Watts, THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: Edward leaves Bella, and she falls into another difficult relationship - this time with Jacob Black.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: Bella is forced to choose between her love for vampire Edward and her friendship with werewolf Jacob.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: The Quileutes close in on Edward and Bella, whose unborn child poses a threat to the Wolf Pack and Forks.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga
programme.desc: The Cullens gather together other vampire clans in order to protect Renesmee from a false allegation.

programme.title: Barefoot
programme.desc: A charming and endearing romantic comedy starring Evan Rachel Wood and Scott Speedman. The "black sheep" son of a wealthy family meets a free-spirited, but sheltered woman. To convince his family that he's finally straightened out his life, he takes her home for his brother's wedding where an improbable romance blooms, as she impresses everyone with her genuine, simple charms.

programme.title: The Ballad of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Striving for justice, this non-stop, gun-toting western thriller stars Bill Pullman and Peter Fonda. Always the grizzled sidekick and never the hero, Lefty is pushed into the limelight when his best friend and longtime partner Edward is brutally murdered. In efforts to seek revenge, he is placed at odds with vested interests, hired guns, corrupt officials and his own abundant failings.

programme.title: Phoenix Forgotten
programme.desc: In search of answers to the unusual events in their Arizona town, three teens went into the desert hoping to document the incident. They disappeared that night and were never seen again. Now, on the 20th anniversary of their disappearance, unseen footage has finally been discovered, chronicling the final hours of their fateful expedition. From Producer Ridley Scott (The Martian, Prometheus) and based on the shocking, true events of March 13th, 1997, when several mysterious lights appeared over Phoenix, Arizona. This unprecedented and inexplicable phenomenon became known as The Phoenix Lights, and remains the most famous and widely viewed UFO sighting in history.

programme.title: The Bombing
programme.desc: Inspired by the heroic, untold true story of Chongqing. Starring legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Adrien Brody (The Pianist), this pulse-pounding war epic centres around the courage of Chinas citizens during WWII. As U.S. Air Force commander Jack Johnson trains the Chinese aviators to battle Japanese fighters, a hot-headed pilot begs to fly a powerful bomber that could stop the attacks.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A young divorce mediator remains cynical until a client's dog pairs her with a local vet.

programme.title: Love By Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: Aimee is always up for a good cause, so when the town's beloved Oak tree is set to be felled, she takes it upon herself to try and save it. But will her actions ultimately lead to love? (2016)

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: The Romantics
programme.desc: Oscar winner Anna Paquin and Katie Holmes prove nothing complicates love like friendship in this zeitgeist love story.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Ambitious Layla Bennet co-hosts morning show Wake Up Chicago! with her handsome colleague Derek Dray. They don't always see eye to eye, so when they suddenly must care for a baby together, it's their worst nightmare!

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: In this heart-warming romantic comedy, an athlete and volunteer form an unexpected bond at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong a lasting marriage.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Braving Rapids
programme.desc: A family goes on a river rafting trip as they process a great loss. Along the way they find a wolf pup. When some unscrupulous folks spot the wolf as well and conspire to steal and sell it, the family and guides fight to protect the pup. Could their journey to deliver the wolf safely to wildlife officials be just the thing to guide them to healing?

programme.title: The Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When groom Tyler leaves life on the world stage, he and June aren't sure they really know each other.

programme.title: Prescription For Love
programme.desc: Claire, a nurse, fights for a chance at love with a charming new doctor and for a promotion to free herself from the misery her supervisor creates. As her supervisor tries to derail Claire's chance at happiness, Claire will have to stand up for herself and go after her dreams.

programme.title: Whisper Island
programme.desc: In pursuit of lost Civil War gold to save their fading ranch, two kids help an old woman solve the mystery of her past.

programme.title: Gastro Blast
programme.desc: On the menu today is Lemon Meringue Pie, a sweet and tangy favourite, made simpler through the use of an already prepared graham cracker crust from the store. Of course the crowning glory of a Lemon Meringue Pie is the fluffy, foamy, cloud-like topping. Link presents some good tips for ensuring volume in the egg whites, while I.Q. tells the scientific reasons behind these tips.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Mommy's Little Girl
programme.desc: Sadie, 11, reunites with mom for happiness. Stars Fiona Gubelman, Emma Hentschel.

programme.title: Baby Sellers
programme.desc: Kirstie Alley stars in a Lifetime movie about infant trafficking and adoption.

programme.title: Christine and Heidi/Debbie/Jim
programme.desc: Christine's and Heidi's trip on a Greek ferry becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: Ex-wife forms unique bond with ex-husband's new wife on road trip.

programme.title: JK's House
programme.desc: At JK's House, Dr. Amber Jenkins (Robin Givens) and JK (Jakayla Lawrence) blend family values and life lessons with music and dance.

programme.title: Fatal Defense
programme.desc: A single mother signs up for self-defense classes from a handsome instructor. But he develops a frightening obsession with her and orchestrates an increasing deadly array of "tests" to see if she has truly learned from his lessons.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and a lost girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: It has been five years after Diana send a man to jail for the murder of her father and fiancee. Then he escapes from prison. He keeps her captive in her own home. Did Diana put an innocent man away?

programme.title: First Sunday
programme.desc: Durell and LeeJohn are best friends and bumbling petty criminals. When told they have one week to pay a $17,000 debt or Durell will lose his son, they come up with a desperate scheme to rob their neighborhood church. Instead, they end up spending the night in the presence of the Lord and are forced to deal with much more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: First Sunday
programme.desc: Durell and LeeJohn are best friends and bumbling petty criminals. When told they have one week to pay a $17,000 debt or Durell will lose his son, they come up with a desperate scheme to rob their neighborhood church. Instead, they end up spending the night in the presence of the Lord and are forced to deal with much more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Only the Valiant
programme.desc: Capt. Richard Lance is unjustly held responsible, by his men and girlfriend, for an Indian massacre death of beloved Lt. Holloway. Holloway is killed while escorting a dangerous Indian chief to another fort's prison. The chief escapes. Knowing their fort is in danger of Indian attack, Lance takes a small group of army misfits to an abandoned nearby army fort to defend a mountain pass against the oncoming Indian assault. Their mission is to stall for time until reinforcements from another fort arrive. The men in this small group of malcontents, deserters, psychopaths and cowards all hate Capt. Lance and wish him dead. Much to their chagrin, the men recognize that Lance's survival instincts, military knowledge and leadership are the only chance the group has of staying alive.

programme.title: Buckskin Frontier
programme.desc: A railroad man and the owner of a freight line battle for control of a crucial mountain pass.

programme.title: Man, Pride & Vengeance
programme.desc: A stalwart Spanish soldier turns to a life of crime to prove his love for a mysterious and promiscuous gypsy woman.

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 46, 47
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: The Lion Has Wings
programme.desc: An excellent example of war-time propaganda film-making.

programme.title: Landfall
programme.desc: Flight Lieutenant Roderick Chambers of the RAF finds himself in trouble when he is accused of sinking a British submarine in the English channel. Feeling he can no longer stay with his unit, he volunteers for the extremely dangerous job of test pilot. Can he now redeem himself?

programme.title: Sea of Sand
programme.desc: The Long Range Desert Group are sent to destroy a German fuel dump.

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands
programme.desc: Two sailors become suspicious when they meet off the north coast of Germany.

programme.title: Dangerous Exile
programme.desc: The young Dauphin of France takes refuge in a Welsh town during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: The adults lost the war and now the kids must save the world! Robots rule the streets and the people are locked in their homes. Stepping outside risks being vaporised by a hulking Sentry or picked off by a lethal Sniper.

programme.title: Exceptional Beings
programme.desc: Two supernatural beings question their divine status when they meet an ordinary woman with a disturbing essence: a human being who does not correspond to what their millennia of knowledge of humanity has taught them.

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Space Warriors
programme.desc: Desperate to follow in the footsteps of his absent astronaut father, 13-year-old Jimmy's dreams come true when he wins one of five opportunities to compete for a scholarship to Space Camp.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark: Lucky Day
programme.desc: An aspiring actress working for a courier service gets involved in the disappearance of her colleague right after they win big on the lottery. Starring Amanda Donohoe

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: Pandora Box Murders
programme.desc: Garage sale guru and amateur sleuth Jennifer comes into possession of an old puzzle box which may contain the key clue in a murder case. Stars Lori Loughlin, Sarah Strange (2018)

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: A team of postal workers who track down the intended recipients of undelivered mail are on a mission to deliver a soldier's letter to a bullied teenager. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth (2015)

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: A Very Foul Play
programme.desc: A murder mystery game takes a dark turn when one of the players is actually killed. Starring Candace Cameron Bure (2019).

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.: Under Siege
programme.desc: A police compound comes under siege after a double agent for the cartel is brought into custody.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Starship Troopers: Traitor of Mars
programme.desc: A distant Federation outpost Fort Casey comes under attack by bugs. The team on the fast attack ship Alesia is assigned to help the Starship John A. Warden stationed in Fort Casey evacuate along with the survivors and bring military intelligence safely back to Earth. Carl Jenkins, now ministry of Paranormal Warfare, takes the starship on a clandestine mission before its rendezvous with the Alesia and goes missing in the nebula. Now, the battle-hardened troopers are charged with a rescue mission that may lead to a much more sinister consequence than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: S.W.A.T.: Under Siege
programme.desc: A police compound comes under siege after a double agent for the cartel is brought into custody.

programme.title: Life at These Speeds
programme.desc: After a teenager's friends are killed in an accident, he finds running allows him to remember them perfectly. Running, however, also brings him notoriety. Soon he finds himself caught between keeping the past alive and making new memories in the present.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny and Mickey Lubitch learn that their son, Tod, is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: The British Mi5, his impossibly wife and an international terrorist, debonair art Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to bank account.

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: A pair of detectives investigate the murder of a rap group while pursuing their other full-time professions.

programme.title: S3 E12 Brixton to Wiltshire
programme.desc: Tessa and David have rapidly grown into a family with the arrival of twins. Now they want to leave their frenetic life in Brixton. They have £400k for a rural retreat in Wiltshire to raise their children and help David fulfil his writing ambitions.

programme.title: S3 E14 Dartford to North Devon
programme.desc: Michael and Diana want a complete change of lifestyle with a move to Devon. Driving instructor Michael wants to turn his back on Dartford's congestion. He and Diana have £375k to find a home that will attract friends and family for the weekend.

programme.title: S3 E16 Glasgow to the Borders
programme.desc: The suburbs of Glasgow have been home to Malcolm for 30 years. Now he wants to escape to Sir Walter Scott country–the Scottish Borders. Melissa Porter turns up a few surprises in her search for a traditional cottage for Malcolm and his partner Cath.

programme.title: S12 E15 North Wales
programme.desc: Nicki aids couple relocate from South Wales to North Wales with £300K.

programme.title: S3 E18 Derby to Lincolnshire
programme.desc: Lawyer Mandi wants to give up her daily commute and open a cattery. She also needs enough land for two show horses–a husband and a son who love tractors! Catherine Gee goes shopping for the home that's going to change the family's life.

programme.title: S14 E1 Herefordshire (Smyth)
programme.desc: Couple seeks 3-bedroom house in Herefordshire for £700,000 to start a business.
